modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't connect to shared drive on HP Elitebook laptop.

full_description_text:  
So, I’m trying to connect to the shared drive across campus on my HP Elitebook, but it’s just not working. I’ve been having trouble accessing it today, and it’s really frustrating. I need some help figuring this out because I can’t get to my files.
short_description: Can't connect to shared drive on HP Elitebook laptop.
description: So, I’m trying to connect to the shared drive across campus on my HP Elitebook, but it’s just not working. I’ve been having trouble accessing it today, and it’s really frustrating. I need some help figuring this out because I can’t get to my files.
